title: Particle Burst
constraints: Only use JavaScript and CSS for animation.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Particles should have a random size between 5-20 pixels.
Partcles should have a random lifetime between 0-5 seconds.

starterCode.html: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Particle Burst</title><link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css"></head><body><canvas id="canvas" width="800" height="600"></canvas><script src="script.js"></script></body></html>

gradingCriteria.description: The particle burst animation works as expected.
New particles are generated when the user clicks the mouse.
Particles move outward from the center of the screen.
Particles have a random lifetime between 0-5 seconds.
